detail.description: Justin Foscue singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Alejandro Osuna to 3rd.
Justin Foscue singles on a ground ball to left fielder Zach Dezenzo.
Justin Foscue hits a ground-rule double (7) on a fly ball down the right-field line. Cam Cauley scores. Alejandro Osuna to 3rd.
Justin Foscue homers (7) on a fly ball to center field.
Justin Foscue singles on a ground ball to left fielder Wade Meckler. Jake Burger scores. Ezequiel Duran to 2nd.

Justin Foscue homers (4) on a fly ball to center field.

Justin Foscue singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Joc Pederson to 2nd.
Justin Foscue singles on a line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Justin Foscue singles on a ground ball to left fielder Troy Johnston, deflected by third baseman Kyle Karros.
